versions.summary: Initial product doc
Personal knowledge base with two consumption tracks
P7: the knowledge feature now ships as an installable Claude Code plugin (marketplace + /knowledge:explain + /knowledge:setup) for any user; architecture kept SaaS-open
P12 authenticated web app is the primary user surface; all web-UI features free
P13 standalone knowledge CLI as a third distribution surface; agent-first non-interactive onboarding; bundled agent-readable guide docs
P15 agent-facing MCP retrieval surface (search as a service); realizes deferred D6; first consumer hi2vi OpenClaw; monetization still future
P16 HTML explainer documents are a first-class KB doc type end-to-end (ingest, safe interactive render, search, MCP read)

P17 explain skill emits an interactive HTML explainer (both modes) with a cited best-practices section; plugin users onboard to the hosted KB via /knowledge:setup Connect mode, one vk_ serving every repo
P18 accounts v2: user/org/project; default org+project on signup; org-level vk_ keys; get-or-create projects; org mgmt deferred (D14)
P19 per-project public/private visibility; anonymous public doc+graph reads; shareable direct doc links
Initial experience doc
P5: calm-editorial operator-designed visual language, landing/browse journeys, per-project pages, CJK search UX + hero affordance
P6: interactive knowledge-map journey settle-then-still label strategy A zoom ladder info panel legend filters landing and nav entry
P6.S1 revision: quiet labels A-prime, idle mingle, pointer/pinch zoom, sticky re-placement, legend lens, roomier layout that survives in-tab reloads
P12 authenticated web app UX: login gate, dashboard, project detail, documents, in-app graph
P13 CLI journey: one-shot init; save/search/list/read/projects/usage; two-token model visible from the terminal; --json/exit-code agent contract
P16 documents journey: an HTML explainer renders as an interactive in-app document (quiz JS runs) safely sandboxed; markdown docs unchanged
P17 /knowledge:explain outputs an interactive HTML explainer (quiz + cited best-practices) for both modes; /knowledge:setup offers Connect (hosted) vs Scaffold (self-host) modes
P18 default org+project on signup; org-level vk_ from the dashboard Org API keys panel; org-not-workspace copy; CLI default fallback + org-key init
P19 public sharing: visibility toggle + share link, anonymous public doc/graph pages, CLI save prints a direct url
Initial architecture doc
Track 2 two-container shape over shared bind-mounted repo
P4: sqlite-vec/RRF seam consumed as hybrid semantic search
P5: browser-only static-search boundary vs local FastAPI hybrid — same corpus, two implementations by deployment target
P6: build-time knowledge-graph data pipeline (mkdocs hook to graph.json static asset) plus browser-only client-side rendering seam
P7: /explain packaged as a Claude Code plugin hosted in this repo — marketplace + isolated plugin/ payload, template-sync snapshot + shared stdlib renderer + parity guard
P8: hosted deployment shape — same codebase, two deployments (local open/never-push vs hosted authed publish-on-write); box clone + server-side push as the publish path

P9: Track 1 web UI is now self-hosted mkdocs live-serve (not GitHub Pages) — two services (knowledge-api + knowledge-site) on one box behind two-location edge routing (/ -> site, /api/* + /healthz -> api)
P10 two-plane app: async Postgres control plane alongside the unchanged files + disposable-SQLite content plane; dormant without DATABASE_URL
P12 separate-origin Next.js app + sealed-cookie BFF; unmetered /app read routes; per-tenant viewer
P13 cli/ package boundary; two deliberate implementations of the knowledge-kb config contract; base-url reads config literally via load_raw not resolve; additive api.project key

P15 MCP retrieval service: proxy-and-forward-bearer thin server (no retrieval rebuilt, scoping inherited), mcp-server/ + knowledge_mcp package boundary, stable contract v1, stateless Streamable-HTTP deploy alongside frozen /api/*

P16 HTML explainer doc type end-to-end: raw-on-disk canonical + extracted-text-in-DB, and the opaque-origin sandboxed-iframe XSS-containment stance (allow-scripts without allow-same-origin + CSP/X-Frame exemption)
P17 open-core plugin template mirrors the multi-tenant SaaS server dormant-safe without DATABASE_URL; a second CI drift gate skills_parity guards the shipped explain-skill copies
P18 user/org/project (tenant row is the org, no rename); org vs project-bound credential split; write-path get-or-create in an async dep before the sync handler
Initial frontend doc
P5: MkDocs Material design system (extra.css token/hook architecture, theme.font false), landing wiring, CJK client-side search, zero-JS hero
P6: interactive knowledge-map renderer vendored hand-rolled force sim first custom JS full-bleed graph page extra.css section 10 extra_javascript allowlisted
P6.S1 renderer revision: live-model port (persistent rAF, +4 tokens, is-on lens), retuned sim + smarter seeding, sessionStorage restore; docs describe publish-safety without the literal path token
P12 authenticated web app in web/ (Next.js, KB design system, sealed-cookie BFF, four surfaces)
P14 public marketing landing at / in web/ via the Claude Design gate (round 01)
P16 web viewer renders HTML explainers in a sandboxed opaque-origin iframe via a same-origin BFF raw-relay route; markdown docs render byte-identically
P18 Org API keys dashboard panel reusing P12 components at org scope (no new route/design round); org BFF helpers; project_id string|null; Workspace to Org copy
P19 public route group: optional-identity doc + public graph pages, PublicShell, visibility toggle+badges, copy-link, robots
Initial backend doc
server/ FastAPI package: config, db, documents, search, gitops, main
P4: recency+RRF hybrid search, embeddings module, delete path, incremental reindex, cross-links, sanitizer
P7: write path auto-creates a minimal docs/<project>/index.md landing for a project's first doc (F1) — never overwrites, joins the scoped commit

P10 accounts layer server/persistence + server/accounts security-types-repository-service async SQLAlchemy 2.0 psycopg3 require_user guard api_auth two-mode resolver per-tenant content root idempotent seed
P11 server/usage package + usage_api; stash + async metering middleware; credential_id; last_used_at on metered events only

P16 HTML explainer ingest/storage/extraction/indexing: raw-HTML-on-disk with comment-frontmatter + stdlib html.parser extracted-text in DB markdown column, format/raw_html columns, reindex/seed widened to .html, raw route
P18 provision_signup primitive; resolver reads credential tenant_id (org keys project_id NULL); get_or_create_project + list_org_credentials; write-path async get-or-create dep
P19 optional_user dependency; public read resolution + Postgres-to-SQLite visibility bridge; mode-aware save url
Initial data doc
SQLite FTS5 document store: documents table + external-content FTS index
P4: document_embeddings cache, related column, CJK query-layer search, publish-safe source
P6: build-time knowledge-graph data contract node/edge model tags-as-nodes ghost/broken edges deterministic publish-safe graph.json
P6 re-review: reword the graph.json publish-safety guarantee without the literal user-home path token (data contract unchanged; F1-F4 were renderer/CSS-only)
P10 6 Postgres accounts tables; documents.tenant_id + UNIQUE(tenant_id, rel_path) + '' legacy sentinel; namespaced tenants/<uuid>/ root; reindex path-derivation survives the disposable-DB rebuild
P11 usage_events control-plane table; event-log grain; derive-on-read GROUP-BY-day aggregate; retention deferred D8
P16 content-plane documents gains format + raw_html columns (disposable ALTER TABLE); DB markdown = extracted text so FTS unchanged; Postgres control plane untouched
P18 alembic 0003: projects UNIQUE(tenant_id,name) with de-dupe; project_credentials.tenant_id NOT NULL + project_id nullable; org keys carry project_id NULL
P19 alembic 0004 projects.visibility text NOT NULL default private; SQLite projects allowlist predicate
Initial api doc
DB-backed document API: read/list/search/reindex + API-owned write path
P4: search pagination + hybrid signals, DELETE + tags/projects, incremental reindex, related links
P7: shipped /knowledge:explain skill config-resolution order + bearer; POST /api/documents auto-creates the project landing (landing_created) as a documented side effect
P8: hosted deployment at knowledge.hi2vi.com — frozen consumer contract (bearer on all /api/*, publish-on-write pushed/push_error, commit_sha = published HEAD)
P9 (additive-only): the 201 url origin is now https://knowledge.hi2vi.com root, served by the box's live-serve site (no longer Pages); /api/* routes unchanged, frozen consumer contract intact
P10 /auth/* + /app/* + /api/* credential-to-tenant resolver; cross-tenant 404; frozen POST /api/documents consumer contract preserved additively
P11 usage reads GET /app/usage + /app/projects/{id}/usage; cross-tenant 404; frozen /api/* contract untouched
P12 unmetered session-scoped /app read routes: dashboard, documents, search, graph
P13 CLI onboarding widened the frozen public contract to /api/* + /auth/* + /app/* + /healthz; new 429 on /auth/{signup,login}

P15 agent-facing MCP retrieval service: contract v1 (search + fetch_document tools, Bearer vk_ over Streamable-HTTP /mcp, additive-only versioning + /healthz.contract_version, tenant-wide corpus scoping) alongside the frozen REST /api/*
P16 HTML explainer doc type: additive format on POST + read projections, new GET /app/documents/{id}/raw route, MCP fetch_document format field; frozen /api/* + contract v1 preserved additively
P18 additive org-level /app/credentials endpoints; signup response gains project; nullable serialize_credential; get-or-create on POST /app/projects + writes; frozen contract additive
P19 visibility field + PATCH toggle; optional-identity public doc/raw reads; org-scoped public graph; mode-aware 201 url
Initial operations doc
Two-service compose (viewer + API), reindex drift repair, bearer auth
GitHub Pages publishing pipeline live (pinned mkdocs-material CI, manual-push deploys)
P4: Gemini embedding env, startup reindex self-heal, mkdocs exclude_docs
P5: site design build asset set, single Google-Fonts @import, deploy-gating site_smoke.py guard, local build/eyeball workflow
P6: mkdocs hooks graph.json emitter build and serve extended smoke guard serve-parity confirmed README knowledge-map mention
P6 re-review: reword the smoke-guard and serve-parity publish-safety notes without the literal user-home path token (build/serve pipeline unchanged; F1-F4 were renderer/CSS-only)
P7: plugin install/setup flow, portable site_smoke deploy gate, plugin-ci parity gate, release/version-bump discipline
P8: production deployment at knowledge.hi2vi.com (dedicated declarative edge, own box clone, compose.prod), publish-on-write flow, KB_GIT_PUSH/KB_REQUIRE_READ_AUTH env, openssh-client is load-bearing
P9: self-hosted two-service site (knowledge-api + knowledge-site live-serve) + manual-dispatch Production Deploy; fresh-on-write replaces the ~65s Pages SLA; Pages retired

P10 postgres:17 in both compose files; explicit alembic upgrade head; python -m server.seed + KB_OPERATOR_EMAIL/KB_OPERATOR_PASSWORD prereqs; deploy/migration runbook; onboarding_smoke verifier; still single-worker
P11 second Alembic migration 0002_usage_events (alembic upgrade head applies both); onboarding_smoke.py extended with the usage meter->read assertions as part of post-deploy verification
P12 web-app local build/run stub; KB_API_BASE_URL + SESSION_SECRET; full deploy P14
P13 knowledge CLI install + edge routes /auth+/app + hosted accounts-plane cutover runbook + auth throttle knobs
P14 web-app deploy: knowledge-web Dockerfile + compose service + reworked edge vhost; mkdocs site retired

P15 knowledge-mcp deploy: mcp-server Dockerfile + compose service, SSE-safe edge /mcp, three-service health-gate + /mcp liveness smoke, dual reachability, e2e_smoke verifier + operator post-deploy run
P15.F1 MCP transport-security Host allowlist: MCP_ALLOWED_HOSTS/MCP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS required — FastMCP localhost-only DNS-rebinding default 421s public+internal hosts; protection stays on
P17 accounts-plane prod cutover executed and verified live; P16 shipped same push; deploy.sh force-recreates the bind-mounted api + freshness self-assert; skills_parity second CI gate
P18 accounts-v2 prod cutover: 0003 migration makes ordering load-bearing (reconcile->migrate->recreate back-to-back); executed + verified live; onboarding_smoke gains an org-model leg
P19 public-projects cutover: additive 0004 no mint-window; onboarding_smoke public-link leg; anonymous surface live 401 to 404
Initial security doc
P4: publish-safe source metadata sanitizer, no local paths on public surface
P7: SaaS-open config model (~/.config/knowledge-kb/config.json, chmod 600), local-only-fallback rule, no secrets in scaffolds, payload isolation
P8: hosted auth model (flag-gated read bearer), the box-only SSH deploy key and the scoped departure from agent-never-pushes, generate-credentials-where-they-live

P9: add the GHA runner->opc@box SSH-key credential (three ORACLE_SSH_* leetusik/knowledge secrets, dedicated ed25519), distinct from the P8 container->GitHub deploy key; deliberate secret-transit exception for the runner key
P10 multi-tenant threat model; argon2id passwords; sha256 token hashing at rest; pinned un-revokable master bearer; cross-tenant content isolation; casing-tolerant operator-email resolution
P11 per-tenant usage isolation; usage reads 404 for missing/cross-tenant; metering best-effort never alters a request; no new PII
P12 sealed-cookie BFF web surface; show-once vk_ key; unmetered read-only web UI

P13 CLI two-token model; passwords never in argv; show-once vk_ written to the seam not printed; chmod 600 enforced in code; public /auth grant throttled server-side per-IP; KB_API_TOKEN tenant-#1 public-write hazard

P16 HTML explainer XSS containment: opaque-origin sandboxed iframe (allow-scripts, no allow-same-origin) + CSP/X-Frame exemption; raw_html never in JSON; XSS-safe-by-construction preserved while quiz JS runs
P18 org-level key authorization made honest (one vk_ grants the whole org); no trust-boundary shift (enforcement already tenant-wide); revoked org keys 401
P19 first anonymous read surface; optional-identity 404-never-403; visibility bridge fail-closed; tokenless BFF relay
Initial qa doc
P5: site-build acceptance = site_smoke.py after a compose build; negative-test pattern for the guard
P6: site_smoke graph.json data-contract custom-JS allowlist built-graph-page landing graph-card invariants root negatives
P6.S1 QA: two extra.css section-10 specificity defeats found by browser QA, CDP geometry probe added as a repeatable overlay/layout tool, publish-safety invariant reworded
P7: plugin E2E + reproducer patterns (render→build→site_smoke on the grown corpus), parity guard negatives, per-project deploy-gate invariant
P8: hosted E2E acceptance against live production; assert the capability (pushed:true) not the status code; shipped-payload slices must run plugin_parity locally

P13 CLI smoke scripts/cli_smoke.py drives the installed binary through lifecycle + logout-survival + 429; generic-401 preserved through the throttle proven live; hosted E2E pending the accounts-plane cutover

P17 hosted end-to-end skill path verified live on prod (signup to vk_ to format html ingest to P16 read and raw to tenant search to MCP vk_ fetch); in-browser quiz-render eyeball is the one operator residual
P18 Postgres-gated org-credentials + provisioning tests; CLI test_auth adjusted; onboarding_smoke org-model journey green local + live prod; pre-existing documents_api format-key failure flagged
Initial decisions doc
Two-track knowledge store plan
GitHub Pages generator: mkdocs-material 9.7.6 re-confirmed over Hugo
P4: CJK query-side search, hybrid RRF, cross-link convention, publish hygiene ADRs
P5: palette 1a Teal + Claude-Design provenance, fonts via @import, nav-feature choices, CJK plugin-lang approach, smoke guard over --strict
P6: hooks-module graph mechanism node/edge model tags-as-nodes docs-current excluded ghost edges data-viz project inks hand-rolled vendored renderer
P6.S1 renderer revision ADR: quiet labels A-prime and idle mingle consciously supersede two locked S0 decisions (operator-directed, Claude Design provenance)
P7 ADRs: MIT license, plugin hosted in this repo with source ./plugin isolation, dynamic project discovery, uv pinned 0.8.14, auto-landing on first project doc, no KB_PUBLIC_BASE_URL default

P8 ADRs: public endpoint + bearer over private network, KB_GIT_PUSH default-off, read-auth as a flag not token-implied, SSH deploy key over PAT, DELETE pushes, no CORS, no edge rate-limit zone, wildcard origin cert
P9 ADRs: self-host the site, live-serve, retire Pages, automated production deploy (in-container reconcile-on-main, fix-forward, edge re-apply, workflow_dispatch-only), dedicated runner key
P10 ADRs Postgres-over-SQLite for accounts; namespaced docs-canonical per-tenant storage; KB_API_TOKEN as the pinned tenant-1 master bearer
P11 ADRs: usage event-log over rollup; meter writes+searches only; derive-on-read; last_used_at on metered events; project name to UUID nullable; free-text event_type
P12 web-app ADRs: web/ subdir, sealed-cookie BFF, KB design system, deploy P14, unmetered read-only web

P13 CLI ADRs: separate cli/ package + git-subdir distribution; direct password grant; two-token model; bundled guide over served; CLI named knowledge; save project = repo basename; server-side auth throttle
P14 landing takes /; app stays at current paths (no /app rebase); mkdocs retired, /docs reserved; Free + waitlist pricing
P17 always-HTML explainer; default-on gated cited offline-degrading web research; plugin-canonical to copies derivation + skills_parity CI guard; parity mirror-not-narrow; plugin 0.3.0
P18 no tenants->orgs rename; org-level keys additive; get-or-create + UNIQUE(tenant_id,name); CLI DEFAULT_PROJECT retargeted to default; no design round for the org-keys surface
